title: Settings
description: Bot configuration — persisted to disk, editable via dashboard RPC.

bot_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this bot instance (UUID).

relay_url.description: WebSocket URL of the Relay server.

license_key.description: License validation key issued at purchase.

connection_password.description: Shared secret used to derive connection_password_proof during auth.

paper_trading.description: When true the bot connects to the broker's paper account.

watchlist.description: Ticker symbols the bot actively monitors.

risk_per_trade_pct.description: Percent of buying power to risk per trade.

min_score.description: Minimum composite score required before the bot enters a position.

auto_trade.description: When false the bot only alerts; no orders are submitted.
